title: Login page not loading
description: User cannot access the login page after clicking the login button. The page remains blank and does not respond even after multiple refresh attempts.

title: Payment gateway error
description: Payment fails during checkout process and users receive an unexpected transaction failure message without proper explanation.

title: Profile update issue
description: Users are unable to update their profile information including name and contact details. Changes are not being saved in the database.

title: Dashboard slow performance
description: Dashboard takes too long to load after login, especially when multiple widgets and reports are enabled for the user.

title: Email notification not sent
description: System does not send confirmation email after registration. Users are not receiving verification or welcome messages.

title: Search feature not working
description: Search results do not appear for valid keywords. The system returns empty results even when matching records exist.

title: Broken image on homepage
description: Hero section image is not displaying properly on the homepage and shows a broken placeholder icon instead.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link redirects users to an error page instead of allowing them to securely update their credentials.

title: Data export malfunction
description: Exported CSV file contains incomplete and mismatched data which affects reporting and external analysis.

title: Mobile responsiveness issue
description: UI layout breaks on smaller screen devices causing misaligned elements and overlapping content sections.
